name: live-consultant
description: Niche-specific business consulting with complete skill assembly, inventory and cash-flow economics, meeting-to-decision analysis, a centrally updated hosted knowledge route, Sabri Suby's Sell Like Crazy system, direct-response marketing, sales, funnels, Meta ads, operations, decisions, and evidence-gated learning.

interface.longDescription: Infer the outcome and exact niche, assemble every relevant skill's complete stored knowledge, and tailor one coherent answer. The hosted read-only knowledge route receives compatible core updates centrally while the bundled skills preserve complete local framework access. Turn business meetings into evidence and accountable actions, release cash trapped in inventory, apply the full Sell Like Crazy buyer-to-sale system, create bold direct-response offers, design funnels and Meta experiments, solve sales and operations problems, and compound from corrections through private, evidence-gated project learning.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose the real bottleneck in my exact niche and recommend the strongest move.
Use $sell-like-crazy to build my complete Dream Buyer-to-sale system.
Use $analyze-business-meeting and $optimize-inventory-cash-flow as needed to turn a meeting or cash-trapped inventory problem into evidence, decisions, owners, and a 13-week plan.
